name: Country Cassoulet
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup coarsely chopped celery with leaves
1/2 pound smoked sausage, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, combine water, beans, bay leaf, salt, and pepper.
2. Bring to a boil; boil uncovered for 2 minutes. Remove from heat.
3. Cover and let soak for 1 hour.
4. Add chicken broth; cover and cook for 1 hour.
5. Meanwhile, fry bacon until crisp. Remove bacon and reserve 2 tablespoons of the drippings.
6. Brown chicken; set aside.
7. In a 3-quart casserole, mix beans and cooking liquid, bacon, carrots, onions, celery, tomatoes, garlic, marjoram, sage. Sprinkle with cloves.
8. Top with chicken. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
9. Add sausage. Uncover; bake about 30 minutes more or until beans are tender.
10. Discard bay leaf. Garnish with chopped parsley.
Recipe may be doubled. Yield: 4 servings.
